raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I noticed a charge from XXXX XXXX XXXX for the amount of {$890.00} made on XX/XX/XXXX. I immediately disputed the charge. I do not use and never did use XXXX XXXX XXXX. I had a conditional credit from Citi up until this month. On XX/XX/XXXX the merchant was contacted then I see another notification that said Congrats! Case resolved in your favor! Good news! We've taken care of your dispute and your credit is permanent .. On XX/XX/XXXX I noticed that the dispute was reopened. Below that, there was a button that said withdraw which I thought meant to withdraw the funds to me since I won the case. WRONG! The withdraw button closed my dispute and it said You withdrew your dispute of this charge, indicating that you have resolved this issue. And the credit got reversed. I then called Citi about this issue and they said they would reopen it. Once again the dispute is opened on XX/XX/XXXX and 5 days later on XX/XX/XXXX, I see that it says A letter detailing your dispute resolution is available in your Notices & Letters. The conditional credit we previously issued will be reversed. I called Citi again about this and asked why it was reversed and they said that since I withdrew the dispute the funds were released to the merchants bank. I called the merchant bank ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ) and they said they would look into it and that since I disputed the charge, they did not receive any funds from the start! I received an email from next gen on XX/XX/XXXX stating Thanks for reaching out to XXXX! 

I did get an update from our billing team. They stated that we lost the dispute on XXXX so there isnt a tracking number for this. The bank would have decline the payment or retracted the funds from out account. 

If it is possible for them to give you a bank statement reflecting they didn't get the funds, you could send this over for further review but its not guarantee though. 

Feel free to reach out with additional questions, were here and happy to help I reached back out to Citi for the statement reflecting that they did not get the funds and they kept insisting that they did not get it. I am stuck and I feel very scammed. I did not make the purchase!!
